body:
Fixes #1814

## Summary
- Add `lino-i18n` as a dependency and route Hive Mind translation loading/runtime lookup through it while keeping the existing i18n wrapper API.
- Convert all existing locale catalogues to deeper nested `.lino` blocks, including old underscore-style key paths, and use triple-quoted multiline strings.
- Preserve every existing runtime translation key with compatibility aliases, including mixed parent-label families such as `error`, `success`, `warning`, and `info`.
- Add regression coverage for nested authoring, deeper grouping, multiline values, old-key compatibility, and locale key parity; refresh the i18n example script.
- Add issue/PR research data, upstream follow-up reports, and solution notes under `docs/case-studies/issue-1814`.

## Reproduction
- A focused i18n test failed before the loader replacement because nested `.lino` blocks were not flattened into runtime keys.
- A deeper-nesting regression test failed before applying the PR feedback because several catalogues still used repeated underscore prefixes.

## Verification
- `node tests/test-i18n.mjs`
- Legacy key value compatibility check: all 311 previous keys matched in each of `en`, `ru`, `zh`, and `hi`
- `node examples/test-i18n.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `node tests/docs-validation.mjs`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (warnings only for pre-existing near-limit files)
- `npm test` (`All 212 selected test file(s) passed.`)

Latest follow-up verification after upstream reports:
- `node tests/docs-validation.mjs`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (warnings only for pre-existing near-limit files)
- `node tests/test-i18n.mjs`
- `npm run format:check`

## Upstream Reports
- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/10 tracks preserving scalar parent translations in deeply nested catalogues.
- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/11 tracks migration aliases for old underscore-tail keys after deeper nesting.
- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/12 tracks adding a real-world Hive Mind-style deep nesting example to upstream docs/tests.

## Notes
- Local install emitted Node engine warnings because the local shell used Node v20.20.2 while this repository and `lino-i18n` declare Node >=24; local checks still passed.
- Hive Mind keeps a small local compatibility layer for historic public keys until the upstream `lino-i18n` issues above are resolved.
